zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk II Pembridge於1291年8月27日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾通時，他的父親Fulk De Pembridge19歲，母親Maud de Harcourt19歲。他和Lady Matilda De Birmingham至少有2個兒子。他去世於1373年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海黑瑟特享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk II Pembridge于1291年8月27日出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾通时，他的父亲Fulk De Pembridge19岁，母亲Maud de Harcourt19岁。他和Lady Matilda De Birmingham至少有2个儿子。他去世于1373年在英国英格兰諾福爾可海黑瑟特享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk II Pembridge was born on 27 August 1291, in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Fulk De Pembridge, was 19 and his mother, Maud de Harcourt, was 19. He had at least 2 sons with Lady Matilda De Birmingham. He died in 1373, in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk II Pembridge est né le 27 août 1291, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulk De Pembridge, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud de Harcourt, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Lady Matilda De Birmingham. Il est décédé en 1373, à Hethersett, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk II Pembridge am 27. August 1291 in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk De Pembridge 19 und seine Mutter Maud de Harcourt 19. Er hatte mit Lady Matilda De Birmingham mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1373 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk II Pembridge è nato il il 27 agosto 1291 nel Tong, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Fulk De Pembridge, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Harcourt, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Lady Matilda De Birmingham. Morì nel 1373, nel Hethersett, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk II Pembridgeが1291年8月27日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングで生まれた時，父Fulk De Pembridgeは19歳，母Maud de Harcourtは19歳であった。彼はLady Matilda De Birminghamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1373年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘスエルセットで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk II Pembridge(이)가 1291년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 탕에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk De Pembridge(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Harcourt(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Lady Matilda De Birmingham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤더세트에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk II Pembridge nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1291, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulk De Pembridge, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Harcourt, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Lady Matilda De Birmingham. Ele faleceu em 1373, em Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk II Pembridge родился 27 августа 1291 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Fulk De Pembridge было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Harcourt, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Lady Matilda De Birmingham. Он умер в 1373 г. в местности хетирсетт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk II Pembridge nació el 27 de agosto de 1291, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Fulk De Pembridge, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maud de Harcourt, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Lady Matilda De Birmingham. Murió en 1373, en Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
